jobDescription: YOU, YES YOU OVER THEREWho we are looking for For an Infrastructure Engineer who is in love with concepts of Infrastructure as Code and immutable infrastructure. For an Engineer who likes to automate everything and is passionate about improving the developer experience. For an Engineer who likes to build secure and resilient systems that perform well under load. What we expect: Experience with Kubernetes and Docker Experience with automation and configuration management using Terraform or alternatives Understanding of networking including DNS, certificate management, load balancing, and firewalls Excited to learn new things and have the drive to continuously improve and develop yourself Strong drive to dig deep into problems and the ability to explore various approaches Experience with or open to working in a remote team You could win a debate on tabs vs. spaces conducted entirely in English
